name: Goodreads: Book Details + Reviews
summary: Open a Goodreads book page and return rich metadata (rating, genres, ISBN, pages, format, cover), the rating histogram, the first page of community reviews (~30), and similar-book URLs.
description: Reads the schema.org ld+json Book block plus the React DOM on a Goodreads /book/show/ page. Returns book chrome, the 5-star ratings histogram, genres, the visible community reviews (Goodreads server-renders ~30), and the 'Readers also enjoyed' book URLs. Pure read. For the full recommendation list with titles/ratings use goodreads/similar; for sorted/filtered or deeper reviews use goodreads/reviews.

book_url.description: Full Goodreads book URL, e.g. https://www.goodreads.com/book/show/29993569-raising-a-secure-child (from goodreads/search). Query strings and #anchors are ignored.

inputs.script: const norm=(s)=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const origin=location.origin;const cleanPath=(h)=>{const m=(h||'').match(/\/book\/show\/[^?#]+/);return m?m[0]:'';};const q=(s)=>document.querySelector(s);const sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));for(let i=0;i<8;i++){if(document.querySelectorAll('article.ReviewCard').length)break;const rh=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('h2,h3')).find(x=>/community reviews/i.test(x.textContent||''));if(rh)rh.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});window.scrollTo(0,document.body.scrollHeight);await sleep(700);}let ld={};for(const el of document.querySelectorAll(`script[type='application/ld+json']`)){try{const j=JSON.parse(el.textContent);if(j['@type']==='Book'){ld=j;break;}}catch(e){}}const agg=ld.aggregateRating||{};let authors=[];if(Array.isArray(ld.author))authors=ld.author.map(a=>norm(a&&a.name)).filter(Boolean);else if(ld.author&&ld.author.name)authors=[norm(ld.author.name)];if(!authors.length){const sa=new Set();document.querySelectorAll('.ContributorLink__name').forEach(e=>{const n=norm(e.textContent);if(n&&!sa.has(n)){sa.add(n);authors.push(n);}});}const title=norm(q(`h1[data-testid='bookTitle']`)?.textContent)||norm(ld.name)||norm(q('h1')?.textContent);const description=norm(q(`[data-testid='description'] .Formatted`)?.textContent)||norm(q(`[data-testid='description']`)?.textContent);const genres=[...new Set(Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(`[data-testid='genresList'] a`)).map(a=>norm(a.textContent)).filter(Boolean))];const breakdown=[];document.querySelectorAll('.RatingsHistogram label, .RatingsHistogram__bar').forEach(el=>{const t=norm(el.textContent);const m=t.match(/^(\d)\s*stars?\s*([\d,]+)\s*\(([^)]+)\)/);if(m)breakdown.push({stars:m[1],count:m[2].replace(/,/g,''),percent:m[3]});});const numOnly=(s)=>{const m=(s||'').match(/[\d,]+/);return m?m[0].replace(/,/g,''):'N/A';};const reviews=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('article.ReviewCard')).map(card=>{const al=card.getAttribute('aria-label')||'';const author=norm((al.match(/^Review by (.+)$/i)||[])[1])||norm(card.querySelector('.ReviewerProfile__name a')?.textContent);const ra=card.querySelector(`[aria-label*='out of 5']`)?.getAttribute('aria-label')||'';const rm=ra.match(/(\d)\s*out of/i);const row=card.querySelector('.ReviewCard__row a');const date=norm(row?.textContent);const rp=(row?.getAttribute('href')||'').match(/\/review\/show\/\d+/);const body=norm(card.querySelector('.TruncatedContent__text')?.textContent);const lk=(card.textContent.match(/(\d[\d,]*)\s+likes?/i)||[])[1];return {author:author||'N/A',rating:rm?rm[1]:'N/A',date:date||'N/A',likes:lk?lk.replace(/,/g,''):'0',body:body||'N/A',review_url:rp?origin+rp[0]:'N/A'};});let simScope=document;const sh=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('h2,h3')).find(x=>/readers also enjoyed/i.test(norm(x.textContent)));if(sh)simScope=sh.closest('div')?.parentElement||document;const seedPath=cleanPath(location.pathname);const su=new Set();const similar_urls=[];for(const a of simScope.querySelectorAll(`a[href*='/book/show/']`)){const p=cleanPath(a.getAttribute('href'));if(!p||p===seedPath||su.has(p))continue;su.add(p);similar_urls.push(origin+p);}return {book:{title:title,author:authors.join(', ')||'N/A',url:location.href.replace(/[?#].*$/,''),avg_rating:String(agg.ratingValue||norm(q(`[data-testid='ratingValue']`)?.textContent)||'N/A'),ratings_count:agg.ratingCount?String(agg.ratingCount):numOnly(q(`[data-testid='ratingsCount']`)?.textContent),reviews_count:agg.reviewCount?String(agg.reviewCount):numOnly(q(`[data-testid='reviewsCount']`)?.textContent),pages:ld.numberOfPages?String(ld.numberOfPages):'N/A',format:ld.bookFormat||'N/A',isbn:ld.isbn||'N/A',language:ld.inLanguage||'N/A',cover_image:ld.image||'N/A',first_published:norm(q(`[data-testid='publicationInfo']`)?.textContent)||'N/A',description:description||'N/A'},rating_breakdown:breakdown,genres:genres,reviews_loaded:reviews.length,reviews:reviews,similar_urls:similar_urls};

steps.name: Extract metadata, histogram, genres, reviews, similar URLs

help.summary: Book metadata + rating histogram + visible reviews + similar-book URLs for one Goodreads book.

examples.description: Fetch a book's details and first page of reviews

returns: Object: { book: { title, author, url, avg_rating, ratings_count, reviews_count, pages, format, isbn, language, cover_image, first_published, description }, rating_breakdown: [{ stars, count, percent }], genres: [..], reviews_loaded, reviews: [{ author, rating, date, likes, body, review_url }], similar_urls: [..] }.
notes: Metadata comes from the schema.org ld+json Book block first, then falls back to data-testid DOM nodes.
Goodreads server-renders ~30 community reviews; rating is 'N/A' on cards where the reviewer left text but no star rating. For sorted/filtered or (when logged in) deeper reviews use goodreads/reviews.

similar_urls are the 'Readers also enjoyed' book URLs (titles are not reliably attached on the carousel); pass any of them back into goodreads/book, or use goodreads/similar for a titled, rated recommendation list.
